infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Prototo connects to your computer to load your live prototype previews.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Prototo uses your location for prototypes with maps or location features.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Prototo accesses your photos for prototypes that let you pick an image.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Prototo uses the camera for prototypes that capture photos or video.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Prototo uses the microphone for prototypes that record audio or video.
